requirement_topic.en: China GB/T Baseline Versus Indonesia Market Entry
requirement_topic.zh: 中国 GB/T 基线与印度尼西亚市场准入
requirement_topic.zht: 中國 GB/T 基線與印尼市場准入

summary.en: Indonesia-facing compliance must be built around Indonesian product, trade, local-content, and grid-connection decisions. A China GB/T or NB/T technical file can demonstrate engineering maturity, but it is not an Indonesian SNI mark, ESDM rooftop PLTS approval, PLN interconnection acceptance, TKDN certificate, or K3L registration.
summary.zh: 面向印度尼西亚的合规必须围绕印度尼西亚产品、贸易、本地含量和并网决定建立。中国 GB/T 或 NB/T 技术文件可以证明工程成熟度，但其不是印度尼西亚 SNI 标志、ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 批准、PLN 并网接受、TKDN 证书或 K3L 登记。
summary.zht: 面向印尼的合規必須圍繞印尼產品、貿易、本地含量和併網決定建立。中國 GB/T 或 NB/T 技術文件可以證明工程成熟度，但其不是印尼 SNI 標誌、ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 批准、PLN 併網接受、TKDN 證書或 K3L 登記。

standards_or_laws: Indonesian SNI, ESDM, PLN, TKDN, and K3L requirements as applicable
Product-specific Indonesian importer, project, and grid-connection files
Official Indonesian regulator or standards-body scope decisions where needed

summary.en: The common China baseline for grid-tied PV inverters includes GB/T 37408 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical requirements, GB/T 19964 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter technical specification, and voluntary CGC or CQC certification. This baseline is useful but should be mapped line-by-line to Indonesian requirements.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器常见基线包括 GB/T 37408 光伏并网逆变器技术要求、GB/T 19964 光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004 光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及自愿性 CGC 或 CQC 认证。该基线有用，但应逐条映射到印度尼西亚要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器常見基線包括 GB/T 37408 光伏併網逆變器技術要求、GB/T 19964 光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004 光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及自願性 CGC 或 CQC 認證。該基線有用，但應逐條映射到印尼要求。

standards_or_laws: CGC or CQC voluntary photovoltaic inverter certification

gap.en: Create an Indonesia delta file rather than reusing the China dossier unchanged: SNI scope, ESDM rooftop PLTS applicability, PLN grid settings, TKDN eligibility, K3L category status, Bahasa Indonesia labels or manuals, and importer responsibilities should be explicitly tracked.
gap.zh: 应建立印度尼西亚差距文件，而不是原样复用中国档案：SNI 适用范围、ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 适用性、PLN 电网参数、TKDN 资格、K3L 类别状态、印尼语标签或手册以及进口商责任均应明确跟踪。
gap.zht: 應建立印尼差距文件，而不是原樣複用中國檔案：SNI 適用範圍、ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 適用性、PLN 電網參數、TKDN 資格、K3L 類別狀態、印尼語標籤或手冊以及進口商責任均應明確追蹤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory status depends on the Indonesian gate: SNI, ESDM / PLN, TKDN, and K3L apply by product scope, project type, procurement route, and network connection
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and NB/T evidence is commonly voluntary or project-driven for export comparison and is not an Indonesian approval

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use the China GB/T file as an engineering baseline only; Indonesian market entry still requires separate SNI, ESDM / PLN, TKDN, K3L, and importer-scope checks.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅将中国 GB/T 文件作为工程基线；印度尼西亚市场准入仍需分别核查 SNI、ESDM / PLN、TKDN、K3L 及进口商适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅將中國 GB/T 文件作為工程基線；印尼市場准入仍需分別核查 SNI、ESDM / PLN、TKDN、K3L 及進口商適用範圍。
